CustomField.description: Sprint 10. Affichage en texte l''adresse de facturation du Client
CustomField.formula: Account.NumVoieFactu__c & " " & TEXT(Account.ComplementNumVoieFactu__c) & ", " & LOWER(TEXT(Account.TypeVoieFactu__c)) & " " & Account.BillingStreet & BR() & Account.BillingCity & ", " & Account.BillingPostalCode
CustomField.label: Adresse de facturation
